steps.t: Clegur can be found south-east of Mossward past the Howlingstones. You should ask Leri Grudd about the floating village.
Leri Grudd has given you exact instructions on where the parcel was buried. Find the parcel in the ruffian camp north of Clegur and return it to her.
You found Leri's parcel. You should take it back to Leri Grudd and confirm its authenticity.
Cranog Dambryn wanders along the banks of the river north-east of Clegur. You should find them if you want to find Glyn Helyg.
You managed to create some chaos inside Radlaw. You should talk to Cranog.
Cranog has told you to look for trail markers he left that lead to Glyn Helyg.
Cranog has told you to look for trail markers in order to locate Glyn Helyg.
Cranog has told you to look for trail markers in order to locate Glyn Helyg.
Cranog has told you to look for trail markers in order to locate Glyn Helyg.
You have found Glyn Helyg. You should deliver Leri's parcel to her cousin Gwenfor.
